Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words
Rajaavin Thoattathil Rojaa chedi
Rojavai raaja nee kattipudi
nee aadum aattathai vittupudi
naan aadum aatathil muthukuli

ethanai aatam undo..hey .nee aduda
athanai attam ellam..hey..poi thaanada
sithargal sonnadhellam ..hey.meithaanada
meiyile meiyayi vaithu..va kai vaiyada

Rendu kaalu horseu
nee vachi paaru race-u
enna venum kettu
nee sundi podu tose-u

Endha pakkam inbam
nee bettu katti paaru
andha pakkam thottu
nee thottu thottu
vetri kodikattu

Pai paiyaai unveetil
panam kottumey
thangathil poo pookkum
un thottamey
kai thatti nee sonnaal
kai kattumey
vinmeengal nee thottaal
kaikettumey

Suthudhu suthudhu boomi
ye unnai kettuthaan
sooriyan varuvdhellaam
ahh unnai paarkathaan
sokkudhu sokkudhu nenjam
hey ye nee paarkathaan

Sikkudhu sikkudhu kangal
ye naan paarkathaan
kallum mannum kooda
un pechai kettu vazhum
aanal inga vandhaa
en pechai ketka venum

Sandhosathukaaga nee
mannil vandha aalu
ennai konjam thottu
nee thottu thottu
muthap padi kattu

we cant stop play'n coz we grow old
we grow old coz we stop play'n
our whole life is a puzzle game,
is in ur life
it is in ur soul
it is in your mind
our heart is gaming on
lets game on lets game on
just play on, have fun
enjoy the game
lets game on... English Translation
I tried my best :)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Rajaavin Thoattathil'?

The song conveys the emotions of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics by Na Muthukumar.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Samar.

Who are the singers of 'Rajaavin Thoattathil'?

The song is sung by K.G. Ranjith and Rita.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Rajaavin Thoattathil' was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Rajaavin Thoattathil' released?

The song was released on January 13, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Samar, 'Rajaavin Thoattathil' serves as a romantic anthem that encapsulates the beauty of love. The song's lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, evoke deep emotions and longing, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. With the harmonious blend of K.G. Ranjith and Rita's voices, the melody creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This enchanting track is sure to leave a lasting impression on anyone who hears it.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rajaavin Thoattathil from Samar is a delightful romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of K.G. Ranjith and Rita, paired with Yuvan Shankar Raja's mesmerizing composition, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. Dive into this melodious journey that perfectly blends heartfelt lyrics with captivating music.
stanzaMeanings: In the garden of the king, the beautiful flowers bloom. In one eye, there is speed, and in the king's garden, there is a playful dance that I will also join.
How many dances are there? Hey, you are the one who makes all the moves. Isn't it all just a lie that the stars told? It's all about the truth, keeping it real.
With two legs, you can see the horse. Look at the race, what do you want? You can put on a show.
Which side brings you joy? Look at that side, touch it, and keep touching until you achieve victory.
In your house, money will flow like a river. Flowers will bloom in your garden, and if you speak, your hands will be tied. If you touch the sky, you will reach the stars.
The earth spins, and it is you that it seeks. The sun will come, but it is hard to see you. My heart is troubled, hey, you are hard to see.
My eyes are troubled, and I can't see. Even the stones and dust are listening to your words, but I need to hear my own words here.
You came to this world for happiness, touch me a little, keep touching, and build a pearl necklace.

We can't stop playing because we grow old, and we grow old because we stop playing. Our whole life is a puzzle game; it's in your life, your soul, and your mind. Our hearts are gaming on, so let's keep playing and enjoy the game.
